headlines.title: Google expands personalized Gemini AI to all US users
headlines.summary: Google is rolling out its Personal Intelligence feature to all US users, allowing Gemini to draw on data from connected apps like Gmail, Photos, and YouTube to deliver more context-aware responses.

headlines.title: White House releases AI policy blueprint for Congress
headlines.summary: The White House published a long-awaited policy wishlist for federal regulation of artificial intelligence, hoping Congress will codify it into law.

headlines.title: Anthropic announces 1M token context window for Claude
headlines.summary: Anthropic announced general availability of 1 million token context windows for Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 at standard pricing, with no beta header and media cap up to 600.

headlines.title: AI startups accounted for 41% of venture capital in 2025
headlines.summary: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share. VCs have invested over half a trillion dollars into AI over the last five years.

headlines.title: Jeff Bezos reportedly seeking $100B for AI-focused industrial fund
headlines.summary: Jeff Bezos is reportedly seeking to raise $100 billion for an AI-focused industrial investment fund, which would be one of the largest investment vehicles ever created.

top_story.title: AI startups captured 41% of all VC funding in 2025 ($128B)
top_story.summary: Artificial intelligence startups have reached a tipping point in venture capital, capturing 41% of all funding in 2025 totaling $128 billion. This represents a record-high annual share and demonstrates how AI has become the dominant force in tech investment.
top_story.why_it_matters: This massive investment signals that AI is transitioning from experimental technology to core infrastructure across industries. The funding concentration suggests we're in a transformative period comparable to the early internet era.
